[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011000111 5
1 100001111 5
2 000111000 3
3 011011011 6
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a

01 10 100010000 2
12 21 101010000 3
23 32 101001100 4
34 43 011000111 5 match 0
45 54 000000111 3
56 65 000001000 1
67 76 000011000 2
70 07 000010000 1

13 31 101100001 4
24 42 001000100 2
35 53 100001111 5 match 1
46 64 000000000 a match 4 5 6 7
57 75 000001011 3
60 06 000010000 1
71 17 001010001 3

36 63 000101000 2
47 74 011000011 4
50 05 100000000 1
61 16 000110000 2
72 27 001011000 3
